description: CompositionCharcoal grey round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with raglan foldover hemmed sleeves, complete inner neck panel and distressed paisley graphic print in the frontFittingComfortWash care Hand wash cold Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Subtly stylish, this grey cotton t-shirt from lee looks perfectly casual with the paisley print. Team it with jeans, shorts or skirts and casual sandals for that comfortable feel.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirts Height-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
